exampleSentences: Anh đi dạo quanh hồ vào mỗi buổi sáng để thư giãn.
Có rất nhiều quán cà phê quanh khu vực này mà em có thể thử.
Bọn trẻ đang chơi quanh công viên suốt cả chiều nay.
notes_md:
**quanh** means **around** (a place), moving or being on all sides of something.

It’s usually a preposition or adverb. Put it before a place noun to mean “around that place.”  

It often combines with verbs of movement or position: đi quanh, chạy quanh, nhìn quanh.  
Very common pair: **xung quanh** = around/surrounding (a bit fuller/stronger than just *quanh*).

Think of *quanh* as the simple, flexible word for physical space “around.”

example.vi: Chúng ta đi quanh công viên.

definitions.vi: Quanh; theo cách tròn hoặc bao quanh.
definitions.en: Around; in a circular or surrounding manner.
definitions.es: Alrededor; de manera circular o envolvente.

translation.en: There are many people around here.
There are many people around here.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I walk around the lake every morning to relax.
There are many coffee shops around this area that you can try.
The kids have been playing around the park all afternoon.

Very common pair: xung quanh = around/surrounding (a bit fuller/stronger than just quanh).
